_comment: Faice (FACE-as-a-service) pricing. Rails + facilitator are inherited from mindX's data/config/x402_pricing.json (single source of truth) when present; this file only sets FACE-specific endpoint prices and the reputation privilege floor. FACE as privilege: an agent whose reputation rank >= privilegeFloor (or BONA FIDE) renders for free; otherwise the FACE is a cost-bearing resource settled over x402 rails.

/api/faice/:agent.description: FACE descriptor (facets + computed wireframe config) for one agent

/faice/:agent.description: Rendered wireframe FACE page for one agent
